productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Checks Blue Tops
description: Composition Blue and white checked top made of 100% Cotton, with short puffed sleeves that have smocked hems, buttoned chest placket, smocked hem and a collar that extends into a scarf in the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Heightened style is what this top from united colors of benetton exudes. Perfect for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this top exudes feminity in all sense of the term. Team this with slim Fit jeans or knee-length skirts, sandals and long earnings for that cool chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in dresses Height-5.8', Chest-33''.
